basic_details.job_title: PAU Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has released the official Scientific Administrative Assistant Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the PAU Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 and 50 years with a Graduate degree in any discipline (preferably Agriculture, Botany, or Biochemistry) and knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric level can apply through the prescribed offline mode on or before 30 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in any discipline (preferably Agriculture/Botany/Biochemistry), Knowledge of Punjabi upto Matric level
qualification.details: Graduate degree in any discipline (preferably Agriculture/Botany/Biochemistry). Knowledge of Punjabi up to Matric level. Desirable: Experience in lab and field work.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PAU Scientific Administrative Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the PAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Scientific Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Scientific Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the PAU Scientific Administrative Assistant post is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in any discipline, with a preference for Agriculture, Botany, or Biochemistry. Additionally, knowledge of Punjabi up to the Matric level is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Scientific Administrative Assistant position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years for the Scientific Administrative Assistant post. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for the PAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 200/-. This fee needs to be submitted along with the application form as per the instructions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Scientific Administrative Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 18,000/- per month, along with 16% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Scientific Administrative Assistant post will primarily involve an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job. The recruitment is for Scientific Administrative Assistant posts on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Scientific Administrative Assistant announced by Punjab Agricultural University.

faq.question: Q9. In which city will the selected candidate be posted?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Punjab Agricultural University, which is located in Ludhiana, Punjab. Therefore, the posting is likely to be in Ludhiana.

faq.question: Q10. How should candidates apply for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply offline. This involves downloading the application form, filling it correctly, attaching necessary documents, and sending it to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.
